entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species used in the study to analyze mitochondrial DNA RFLP patterns.

entities.name: RFLP
entities.description: Restriction Fragment Length Polymorphism used to analyze DNA banding patterns.

entities.name: MITOCHONDRIAL DNA
entities.description: The mitochondrial DNA (mtDNA) used as a source for RFLP analysis.

entities.name: OPEN-POLLINATED SEED
entities.description: Seeds produced by open pollination used as a source for mtDNA-RFLP analysis.

entities.name: SIBBED SEED
entities.description: Seeds produced from siblings used as a source for mtDNA-RFLP analysis.

entities.name: TOTAL DNA
entities.description: The total genomic DNA (tDNA) used as a source for RFLP analysis.

entities.name: SOUTHERN BLOT
entities.description: The technique used to detect specific DNA sequences in RFLP analysis.

entities.name: ENZYME-PROBE COMBINATIONS
entities.description: The specific combinations of restriction enzymes and probes used to generate RFLP patterns.
